summary: Critical issues: (1) Missing test fixtures—test-workflow.sh references tests/test_semver.bats and tests/fixtures.sh that don't exist, causing workflow test job to fail. (2) Portability bug—semver-bumper.sh line 22 uses `sed -i` which requires platform-specific handling (macOS needs suffix). (3) No input validation—main_flow doesn't check if version_file exists or if git refs are valid. (4) Workflow missing permissions section (should declare minimal permissions). (5) Test harness incomplete—references non-existent files, doesn't validate actual outputs. Deliverable is unshippable in current state.
